landing.heroSubtitle: A high-reasoning AI chat platform with solo conversations, collaborative group rooms, and real-time intelligence — powered by your choice of AI provider.
landing.capabilitiesTitle: Everything you need to think clearly
landing.capabilitiesSubtitle: Built for developers, researchers, and teams who demand more from their AI conversations.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up with email or Google OAuth in seconds
landing.step2Desc: Pick an AI provider and model, then ask anything
landing.step3Desc: Create rooms, invite teams, and use @ai mentions
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join ChatSphere and unlock multi-provider AI reasoning, group collaboration, and persistent memory — all in one platform.
landing.featureDeepReasoningDesc: A reasoning engine that breaks down problems, challenges assumptions, and thinks in multiple dimensions.
landing.featureSoloChatDesc: Private conversations with full markdown, code highlighting, and persistent history saved to MongoDB.
landing.featureGroupRoomsDesc: Create or join rooms and collaborate with AI via @ai mentions in real-time.
landing.featureRealtimeDesc: Instant messaging with Socket.IO — typing indicators, read receipts, and live updates.
landing.featureSecureAuthDesc: JWT access/refresh tokens plus Google OAuth. Password reset and admin controls built in.
landing.featureMultiProviderDesc: Supports OpenRouter, Gemini, Grok, Groq, Together AI, and Hugging Face. Pick your model.
landing.featureAiMemoryDesc: AI remembers context across conversations. Extract insights, tasks, and decisions automatically.
landing.featureCodeHighlightDesc: Beautiful syntax highlighting for 100+ languages. Copy code blocks with one click.
landing.featureSmartRepliesDesc: AI-generated reply suggestions based on conversation context. Respond faster.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your conversations
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Join ChatSphere and start chatting with AI
auth.passwordRequirements: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number
auth.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured for this local setup yet.
auth.googleExchangeFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordNeedsUpper: Password must contain an uppercase letter
auth.passwordNeedsLower: Password must contain a lowercase letter
auth.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetLinkSent: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...
